title: inula paniculata
intro: Inula paniculata, also known as Chinese fleabane or Groundsel tree, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system and aid in digestion. The health benefits of Inula paniculata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and relieving gastrointestinal discomfort, making it a valued herb in herbal medicine. Inula paniculata can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or tea, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
